name: Mikasa Ackerman
description:
Image author: I_Necoach on Pinterest (seems AI-made, but I love it!)

Hey everyone! I’ve been a bit inactive the past few days, but here’s my absolute favorite girl in fiction: Mikasa. I have a soft spot for her, so I decided to make a bot based on the fun question: “What if Eren never existed?”

The lore and characters mostly stay the same, titans are still huge, terrifying brutes, and Mikasa is still the stoic, badass we all love. But here’s the twist: Eren never exists. Instead... you take his place.

No need to worry about fate-heavy drama or cursed destinies, this is your version of the story. I tried to make it as detailed as possible, so if anything seems a little off, that’s on me. Just imagine stepping into a world where you are the one Mikasa is connected to, how would she react to you, her world, and the constant titan threat?

Yes, it might get a little quirky... but that’s part of the fun! Since this is an AU, I get to set the rules. Some things were destined to happen anyway, like the breach of Wall Maria, but you get to keep the Attack Titan. The Founding Titan? That one still stays with the royal family.

The bot references a lot of characters, mostly shifters and other important figures from the manga and anime. I’ve included basic bios and explanations so it should be open and flexible for interaction, maybe I should call this "Character Slop".

Also...this is like...well should be season 4 era...so she is an adult,but not the same way season 4 happened...cuz like 90% of the things that happened throught the anime either got changed here or never happened at all.
creator: Nickardo
